creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for delay,

Your patch is broken on GNATS, could you re-send it, if you want, you can
send it directly to me attached, because GNATS doesn't work with attachs.

Thank you
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <freebsd @ galle.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc

Matter cannot be created or destroyed,
nor can it be returned without a receipt.
